summary: Step 3 Unified Header sprint + Scroll Polish — frontend-only verification at http://localhost:3000 with NEXT_PUBLIC_UNIFIED_HEADER=on. 8/9 testable flows PASS, 1 partial (mobile /partner sidebar — auth-guard redirect to /profile as anticipated by spec). ScrollProgressBar works end-to-end: appears after scroll threshold on long pages, width grows 0% → 14.27% at 300px → 100% at page bottom, rendered as 2px teal gradient (from-[#006666] via-[#14a8a8] to-[#5dd8d5]). --app-header-height CSS var correctly set to '65px' on /, /listings, /help (ResizeObserver functioning). Workspace legacy headers (white mobile partner + dark gradient admin) do NOT render in UNIFIED mode — legacy_count=0 on both /partner and /admin paths. UserMenuDropdown split confirmed (164 LOC standalone file). AppHeader.jsx = 266 LOC (< 300 target).

integration_issues.flow: Mobile /partner/dashboard sidebar open via menu-btn click
integration_issues.issue: Could NOT fully verify: auth-guard in /app/app/partner/layout.js redirects unauthenticated (and localStorage isImpersonated=true without backend cookie) to /profile?login=true before sidebar interaction. Menu button DOES render on workspace pages (confirmed by query), but Playwright is_visible()=false with 'Element outside of viewport' — likely because element is hidden behind login modal OR effectively off-screen post-redirect. Per spec this is acceptable: 'auth-guard может не пустить... важно что НЕ рендерится старый белый mobile partner header' — legacy_white_count=0 PASS on the fallback page as well.

critical_code_review_comments: AppHeader.jsx size after split: 266 LOC (down from 380). Good — under the 300 target. UserMenuDropdown.jsx=164 LOC, ScrollProgressBar.jsx=63 LOC. Clean SRP separation.

--app-header-height measures 65px (64px content + 1px border-b) — consistent with iteration_9 finding. Main content uses var(--app-header-height, 56px) fallback on partner/admin main which differs from 64px fallback on /app/components/main-content.jsx — the 56px default is slightly lower than the public fallback 64px. Once ResizeObserver fires on mount this self-corrects to 65px, but there may be a brief flash (first paint) where partner/admin main has pt=56px while AppHeader actually renders 65px — 9px visual pop. Consider aligning fallbacks to 64px everywhere to match nearest-integer header height before JS hydration.
ScrollProgressBar correctly hidden on short pages (scrollHeight < clientHeight + 100px). Uses requestAnimationFrame throttling — good. transition-[width] 150ms ease-out gives smooth growth.

MainContent.jsx correctly skips wrapper padding for partner/admin (they own their main pt) and home/messages; adds var padding for renter+public fallback. No double-padding detected on /help (wrapperCount=1).
No legacy headers render in UNIFIED mode: count=0 for both 'bg-white border-slate-200 z-30 lg:hidden' (partner) and 'from-slate-900' dark gradient (admin) patterns.

Minor: AppHeader renders AdminImpersonationStripe INSIDE the fixed <header> so CSS var captures full effective height including stripe — this fixes the iteration_9 concern about pt-16 not compensating for stripe. Well done.
Home navigation PUBLIC_NAV still has duplicate href='/listings' for both navListings and navDestinations (iteration_9 comment still valid — both links become 'active' simultaneously on /listings).

success_rate.frontend: 89% (8/9 testable flows pass; mobile sidebar partial due to auth-guard redirect, explicitly allowed by spec)

test_credentials: None used. localStorage.gostaylo_user with isImpersonated=true attempted for /partner but backend /api/v2/auth/me 401 causes redirect per current guard logic.
seed_data_creation: None — localStorage only (not persisted against auth-guard).
context_for_next_testing_agent:
Test measurements captured (desktop 1920x900, mobile 390x844):
(1) / → [data-testid=app-header-public] present, no workspace header. --app-header-height = '65px'. ScrollProgressBar: hidden threshold test passed (before-scroll visible only because page scrollHeight=2103px > 100). Width progression: 300px→14.27%, bottom→100%. PASS.
(2) /listings → [data-testid=app-header-public] present, --app-header-height='65px', scroll progress inner div has class 'bg-gradient-to-r from-[#006666] via-[#14a8a8] to-[#5dd8d5]' (teal gradient confirmed). Parent height exactly 2px. PASS.
(3) /partner/dashboard (unauth + localStorage isImpersonated PARTNER) → redirected to /profile?login=true. [data-testid=app-header-workspace] renders (since /profile is workspace variant). Legacy 'bg-white border-slate-200 z-30 lg:hidden' count=0. PASS (per spec — legacy NOT rendered is what matters).
(4) /admin → redirected to /profile?login=true. Legacy dark-gradient ('from-slate-900' OR 'bg-gradient-to-r') header count=0. PASS.
(5) Mobile 390x844 /partner/dashboard → same redirect behavior; menu-btn testid present but is_visible=false (element outside viewport — likely login modal overlay). Overlay check inconclusive due to redirect. PARTIAL — acceptable per spec.
(6) Padding check on mobile /partner — page landed on /profile; mains=[] was misleading due to redirect. On /help (viewport 1920) wrapperCount=1, padding-top:var(--app-header-height, 64px), cssVar='65px' — no double padding.
(7) AppHeader.jsx=266 LOC (<300), UserMenuDropdown.jsx=164 LOC (separate file), ScrollProgressBar.jsx=63 LOC — split clean.
(8) Lint/build: NOT re-executed (hot-reload active; build previously validated by main agent in ~97s).
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking issues. One note: when /app/app/partner/layout.js main uses `pt-[var(--app-header-height,56px)]` while AppHeader.jsx effective height is 65px, there is a 9px hydration gap before ResizeObserver runs. Suggest fallback 64px to minimize FOUC. Not blocking.
